keyEvents.text: Andre Rampersad (Trinidad and Tobago) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Godfried Roemeratoe (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half begins Trinidad and Tobago 0, Curaçao 0.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Duane Muckette replaces Daniel Phillips.
Substitution, Curaçao. Justin Ogenia replaces Juninho Bacuna.
Kevin Felida (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card.
Neveal Hackshaw (Trinidad and Tobago) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. André Raymond replaces Ross Russell Jr. because of an injury.
